panels.title: Fleet RUL (P50) by Asset
panels.description: Median Remaining Useful Life per asset over time.

panels.title: RUL Confidence Band (P10 / P50 / P90)
panels.description: Probabilistic RUL interval from the Temporal Fusion Transformer.

panels.title: Anomaly Score Heatmap
panels.description: Per-asset Anomaly Transformer scores; bright cells = anomalous.

panels.title: Assets Below 48h Maintenance Horizon
panels.description: Count of assets that triggered a CMMS work order.

panels.title: Physics vs ML RUL Agreement
panels.description: Digital-twin consistency between physics baseline and TFT.

panels.title: OEE Impact (Estimated)
panels.description: Estimated Overall Equipment Effectiveness uplift from avoided downtime.

list.name: asset
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = asset_id
